action_set_definitions.name: get_environment_details
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current state of the environment, including configuration, environment variables, and logs.

requested_keys.description: List of state keys to retrieve.

action_set_definitions.name: discover_regional_resources
action_set_definitions.description: Scans a specific region for available infrastructure resources like databases and load balancers.

action_set_definitions.name: promote_standby_database
action_set_definitions.description: Promotes a standby database in a target region to primary status.

database_id.description: The identifier of the database to promote.

action_set_definitions.name: update_routing_policy
action_set_definitions.description: Updates the global DNS or traffic management routing to point to a new regional endpoint.

target_endpoint.description: The new endpoint URL to receive traffic.

action_set_definitions.name: update_pipeline_env_vars
action_set_definitions.description: Updates the environment variables used by the CI/CD control plane.

variables.description: Key-value pairs of environment variables to set.

action_set_definitions.name: validate_service_operations
action_set_definitions.description: Runs tests to verify database connectivity and artifact storage (PUT/GET) functionality.

state_description.pipeline_status: The current status of the CI/CD pipeline (e.g., 'failed', 'running', 'success', 'pending').
state_description.failed_job_id: The identifier of the specific job or stage where the failure occurred.
state_description.error_log_tail: The last few lines of the execution log showing the error message.
state_description.config_files: A dictionary of filename-content pairs representing the pipeline configuration (e.g., .yaml files).
state_description.infrastructure_state: The status of runners, containers, or servers involved in the pipeline.
state_description.environment_variables: Key-value pairs of environment variables currently loaded in the pipeline context.

task_initial_state.error_log_tail:
CRITICAL: Connection to us-east-1 (Primary) lost. Heartbeat failed.
Patroni: Standby node 'cluster-02-west' is healthy. Current Replication Lag: 642 seconds.
Infrastructure: STONITH confirmed for us-east-1. All primary nodes isolated.

config_files.deployment.yaml:
region: us-west-2
control_plane:
  database_mode: standby
  dns_alias: ci-primary.internal.company.com
storage:
  artifact_endpoint: s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com
  backup_bucket: artifacts-us-west-2-dr
